title: useScrollIntoView
description: Smoothly scrolls an element into view and provides controls to handle the scrolling behavior.
summary: Programmatically scrolls an element into view with animation.

`,(0,e.jsx)(t,{name:"use-scroll-into-view",code:`"use client";\r
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from "react";\r
import { useWindowEvent } from "@/hooks/use-window-event";\r
import { useReducedMotion } from "@/hooks/use-reduced-motion";\r
\r
interface ScrollIntoViewAnimation {\r
  alignment?: "start" | "end" | "center";\r
}\r
interface ScrollIntoViewParams {\r
  onScrollFinish?: () => void;\r
  duration?: number;\r
  axis?: "x" | "y";\r
  easing?: (t: number) => number;\r
  offset?: number;\r
  cancelable?: boolean;\r
  isList?: boolean;\r
}\r
interface ScrollIntoViewReturnType<Target extends HTMLElement, Parent extends HTMLElement | null = null> {\r
  scrollableRef: React.RefObject<Parent>;\r
  targetRef: React.RefObject<Target>;\r
  scrollIntoView: (params?: ScrollIntoViewAnimation) => void;\r
  cancel: () => void;\r
}\r
\r
export const easeInOutQuad = (t: number) => (t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : -1 + (4 - 2 * t) * t);\r
\r
export const getRelativePosition = ({ axis, target, parent, alignment, offset, isList }: any): number => {\r
  if (!target || (!parent && typeof document === "undefined")) {\r
    return 0;\r
  }\r
  const isCustomParent = !!parent;\r
  const parentElement = parent || document.body;\r
  const parentPosition = parentElement.getBoundingClientRect();\r
  const targetPosition = target.getBoundingClientRect();\r
\r
  const getDiff = (property: "top" | "left"): number => targetPosition[property] - parentPosition[property];\r
\r
  if (axis === "y") {\r
    const diff = getDiff("top");\r
\r
    if (diff === 0) return 0;\r
\r
    if (alignment === "start") {\r
      const distance = diff - offset;\r
      const shouldScroll = distance <= targetPosition.height * (isList ? 0 : 1) || !isList;\r
\r
      return shouldScroll ? distance : 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    const parentHeight = isCustomParent ? parentPosition.height : window.innerHeight;\r
\r
    if (alignment === "end") {\r
      const distance = diff + offset - parentHeight + targetPosition.height;\r
      const shouldScroll = distance >= -targetPosition.height * (isList ? 0 : 1) || !isList;\r
\r
      return shouldScroll ? distance : 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    if (alignment === "center") {\r
      return diff - parentHeight / 2 + targetPosition.height / 2;\r
    }\r
\r
    return 0;\r
  }\r
\r
  if (axis === "x") {\r
    const diff = getDiff("left");\r
\r
    if (diff === 0) return 0;\r
\r
    if (alignment === "start") {\r
      const distance = diff - offset;\r
      const shouldScroll = distance <= targetPosition.width || !isList;\r
\r
      return shouldScroll ? distance : 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    const parentWidth = isCustomParent ? parentPosition.width : window.innerWidth;\r
\r
    if (alignment === "end") {\r
      const distance = diff + offset - parentWidth + targetPosition.width;\r
      const shouldScroll = distance >= -targetPosition.width || !isList;\r
\r
      return shouldScroll ? distance : 0;\r
    }\r
\r
    if (alignment === "center") {\r
      return diff - parentWidth / 2 + targetPosition.width / 2;\r
    }\r
\r
    return 0;\r
  }\r
\r
  return 0;\r
};\r
\r
export const getScrollStart = ({ axis, parent }: any) => {\r
  if (!parent && typeof document === "undefined") {\r
    return 0;\r
  }\r
\r
  const method = axis === "y" ? "scrollTop" : "scrollLeft";\r
\r
  if (parent) {\r
    return parent[method];\r
  }\r
\r
  const { body, documentElement } = document;\r
\r
  // while one of it has a value the second is equal 0\r
  return body[method] + documentElement[method];\r
};\r
\r
export const setScrollParam = ({ axis, parent, distance }: any) => {\r
  if (!parent && typeof document === "undefined") {\r
    return;\r
  }\r
\r
  const method = axis === "y" ? "scrollTop" : "scrollLeft";\r
\r
  if (parent) {\r
    parent[method] = distance;\r
  } else {\r
    const { body, documentElement } = document;\r
    body[method] = distance;\r
    documentElement[method] = distance;\r
  }\r
};\r
\r
export function useScrollIntoView<Target extends HTMLElement, Parent extends HTMLElement | null = null>({ duration = 1250, axis = "y", onScrollFinish, easing = easeInOutQuad, offset = 0, cancelable = true, isList = false }: ScrollIntoViewParams = {}) {\r
  const frameID = useRef(0);\r
  const startTime = useRef(0);\r
  const shouldStop = useRef(false);\r
\r
  const scrollableRef = useRef<Parent>(null);\r
  const targetRef = useRef<Target>(null);\r
\r
  const reducedMotion = useReducedMotion();\r
\r
  const cancel = (): void => {\r
    if (frameID.current) {\r
      cancelAnimationFrame(frameID.current);\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const scrollIntoView = useCallback(\r
    ({ alignment = "start" }: ScrollIntoViewAnimation = {}) => {\r
      shouldStop.current = false;\r
\r
      if (frameID.current) {\r
        cancel();\r
      }\r
\r
      const start = getScrollStart({ parent: scrollableRef.current, axis }) ?? 0;\r
\r
      const change =\r
        getRelativePosition({\r
          parent: scrollableRef.current,\r
          target: targetRef.current,\r
          axis,\r
          alignment,\r
          offset,\r
          isList\r
        }) - (scrollableRef.current ? 0 : start);\r
\r
      function animateScroll() {\r
        if (startTime.current === 0) {\r
          startTime.current = performance.now();\r
        }\r
\r
        const now = performance.now();\r
        const elapsed = now - startTime.current;\r
\r
        // easing timing progress\r
        const t = reducedMotion || duration === 0 ? 1 : elapsed / duration;\r
\r
        const distance = start + change * easing(t);\r
\r
        setScrollParam({\r
          parent: scrollableRef.current,\r
          axis,\r
          distance\r
        });\r
\r
        if (!shouldStop.current && t < 1) {\r
          frameID.current = requestAnimationFrame(animateScroll);\r
        } else {\r
          if (typeof onScrollFinish === "function") {\r
            onScrollFinish();\r
          }\r
          startTime.current = 0;\r
          frameID.current = 0;\r
          cancel();\r
        }\r
      }\r
      animateScroll();\r
    },\r
    [axis, duration, easing, isList, offset, onScrollFinish, reducedMotion]\r
  );\r
\r
  const handleStop = () => {\r
    if (cancelable) {\r
      shouldStop.current = true;\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  /**\r
   * detection of one of these events stops scroll animation\r
   * wheel - mouse wheel / touch pad\r
   * touchmove - any touchable device\r
   */\r
\r
  useWindowEvent("wheel", handleStop, {\r
    passive: true\r
  });\r
\r
  useWindowEvent("touchmove", handleStop, {\r
    passive: true\r
  });\r
\r
  // cleanup requestAnimationFrame\r
  useEffect(() => cancel, []);\r
\r
  return {\r
    scrollableRef,\r
    targetRef,\r
    scrollIntoView,\r
    cancel\r
  } as ScrollIntoViewReturnType<Target, Parent>;\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-scroll-into-view.ts"})]})}function u(r={}){let{wrapper:n}=r.components||{};return n?(0,e.jsx)(n,{...r,children:(0,e.jsx)(d,{...r})}):d(r)}function v(r,n){throw new Error("Expected "+(n?"component":"object")+" `"+r+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return b(R);})();
;return Component;
